rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Educ. Code §21.457, which governs commissioner-developed training materials for teachers of emergent bilingual students.
quote: The commissioner shall develop and make available training materials and other teacher training resources to assist teachers in developing the expertise required to enable emergent bilingual students to meet state performance expectations.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and education training statute.
